white.$description: Pure white. Used as surface background and typical on-color for dark brand fills.

black.$description: Pure black. Rarely used — prefer color.neutral.900 for text and dark surfaces.

50.$description: Lightest surface. Replaces Alexandria #f8f8f8 and legacy 'grey'.

100.$description: Subtle surface. Replaces Alexandria #f5f5f5 / light-grey / supporting.light.

200.$description: Quiet surface / default border on light mode. Replaces Alexandria #efefef / supporting.base / legacy border.

300.$description: Border strong / disabled fill. Replaces Alexandria #d9dadc / supporting.dark / border-dark.

400.$description: Muted foreground on light surfaces. Replaces Alexandria #c1c1c1.

500.$description: Secondary text (most-used neutral). Replaces Alexandria #6b6b6b / secondary-text / supporting.secondary.

600.$description: Icon dark / secondary emphasis. Replaces Alexandria #3c3c3c.

700.$description: Strong text on light surfaces. Replaces Alexandria #292d32.

800.$description: Charcoal blue, alternative navy. Replaces Alexandria #2d4256 / charcoal-blue.

900.$description: Primary text / dark surface. Hero neutral of the Code Sherpas identity. Replaces Alexandria #101820 (279 usages) / main.base / navy-blue-text.

50.$description: Primary tint, lightest. Replaces Alexandria #eef1fd / new-primary.light derivates.

100.$description: Primary tint, soft. Replaces Alexandria #dbe1fc / new-primary.light.

600.$description: Primary brand color (sea blue). Replaces Alexandria #2a48e9 / sea-blue-primitive / new-primary.base.

fg.$description: Success foreground. Darkened from Alexandria #05b661 (L=68%, failed WCAG) to pass AA 4.5:1 vs white background and AA 3:1 for white text on filled surfaces.

bg.$description: Success background, subtle tint of success.fg.

on.$description: Readable on success.fg filled surfaces (WCAG AA).

fg.$description: Error foreground. Replaces Alexandria #ef2828 / true-red-opaque. Decision D2: single red (laser-red merged).

on.$description: Readable on error.fg filled surfaces (WCAG AA).

bg.$description: Warning background, subtle. Replaces Alexandria #ddb10110 / warning.back.

on.$description: Readable on warning.fg filled surfaces (WCAG AA). Warning is light/amber — needs dark on-color.

fg.$description: Info foreground. Darkened from Alexandria #009bf9 (L=67%, failed WCAG) to pass AA 4.5:1 vs white background.

bg.$description: Info background, subtle tint of info.fg.

on.$description: Readable on info.fg filled surfaces (WCAG AA).
